source_jobs.description: <p><strong>• Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Business, Finance, or equivalent<br>• Avaloq certification<br>• Avaloq functional training<br>• Minimum 3–8 years of Business Analyst experience in banking or financial services<br>• Strong functional knowledge of Avaloq Core Banking (Private Banking)<br>• Experience supporting regulatory or compliance-driven initiatives<br>• Experience working with vendors and system integrators in a banking environment<br>• Strong requirement analysis and documentation skills<br>• Good understanding of Private Banking / Wealth Management operations<br>• Ability to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders<br>• Strong coordination and stakeholder management skills<br>• Detail-oriented, structured, and delivery-focused<br>• Willingness to work onsite based on project and operational needs</strong></p>
